name: dynamic-cloud-dns
description: Dynamic DNS functionality backed by Google Cloud DNS.

scripts.deploy: . ./.env && test -n "$GCP_PROJECT" || { echo 'Error: GCP_PROJECT is not set'; exit 1; } && test -n "$DEPLOY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT" || { echo 'Error: DEPLOY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT is not set'; exit 1; } && gcloud functions deploy dynamic-dns --gen2 --region=us-central1 --project=$GCP_PROJECT --runtime=nodejs22 --source=. --entry-point=updateHost --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --memory=256Mi --max-instances=1 --timeout=60s --service-account=$DEPLOY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT --env-vars-file=.env.yaml --set-secrets=SECRET_TOKEN=dynamic-dns-token:latest
